description: General service complaints such as late delivery, rude driver, and overall dissatisfaction.

scenarios.customer_message: My laundry was supposed to arrive yesterday and it's still not here.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry about the delay. Please hold on while our team looks into your order and gets back to you shortly.

scenarios.customer_message: Your driver was really rude to me at pickup, very disappointing.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry to hear about your experience. I'll pass this to our team so they can look into it and follow up with you.

scenarios.customer_message: Honestly I'm not happy with the service I received this time.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry the service didn't meet your expectations. I'll share your feedback with our team so they can help.

scenarios.customer_message: The clothes came back still smelling and not properly cleaned.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry to hear that. Please hold on while our team reviews your order and gets back to you shortly.
